curationMethod: manual reading of existing archive files
premise: 人类文明在巨型怪物生态圈中发展，猎人由公会认证并承担调查、狩猎、护卫、灾害应对和生态调节任务。故事以区域巡礼、装备成长与禁忌怪物线索推进。

coreSystems.name: 猎人公会
coreSystems.description: 管理猎人、发布任务、避免恶性狩猎和无经验牺牲的民间大型组织；各地公会相互独立但制度趋同。

coreSystems.name: 任务星级
coreSystems.description: 以村任务、集会所任务、特殊许可任务等评定猎人阶位，替代纯游戏化HR/MR。

coreSystems.name: 狩猎准备
coreSystems.description: 承接任务、猫饭、道具、环境观察、陷阱、素材剥取和装备锻造构成稳定流程。

coreSystems.name: 生态平衡
coreSystems.description: 怪物不是单纯邪恶，狩猎是对异常生态和人类生存风险的调节。

coreSystems.name: 古龙/禁忌怪物
coreSystems.description: 活动天灾级存在，由古龙观测局等机构追踪预警。

rpUse: OC通常作为猎人、学者、受付员、工匠、调查员、艾露伙伴或村落居民介入；狩猎应强调准备和生态逻辑。
notes: Runtime caveat: characters-index is not a complete Monster Hunter canon named NPC roster.
Hunter/guild/village/research/ecology entries are occupational or ecological role slots unless a later entry supplies a fixed canon name.

runtimeUseGate.characterIndexPolicy: characters-index is primarily occupational, institutional, and ecological role slots because sources emphasize systems over named NPCs
runtimeUseGate.runtimePolicy: do not treat hunter/guild/ecology role entries or monster categories as a complete fixed canon NPC list
